text.title: Agentic FinOps Workflow with AI Agents Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Agent deletes 'idle' volume mid-snapshot-restore; downtime; trust loss.
antipattern.root-cause: HIL gate skipped for non-prod 'low-risk' actions.
antipattern.fix: Force HIL on every destructive action regardless of env; rate-limit anyway.

antipattern.symptom: Agent IAM has `ec2:*`. Bug triggers mass termination.
antipattern.root-cause: Time pressure during pilot; least-privilege deferred.
antipattern.fix: Bind mutate permissions to approval-token claim via IAM condition or OPA.

antipattern.symptom: Approver clicks yes on Slack without reading; bad decision.
antipattern.fix: Mandate structured payload schema; reject malformed approvals.

antipattern.symptom: Finance can't reconcile $7k saved last quarter; cannot audit.
antipattern.fix: Pipe all actions into append-only store with retention ≥1yr.
